us.wa.wsdot.traffic.TrafficFlowStation.name: TrafficFlowStation
us.wa.wsdot.traffic.TrafficFlowStation.description: Metadata for a traffic flow sensor station in the Washington State DOT network. WSDOT deploys approximately 1,400 inductive loop sensors embedded in highway pavement across four geographic regions.

us.wa.wsdot.traffic.TrafficFlowReading.name: TrafficFlowReading
us.wa.wsdot.traffic.TrafficFlowReading.description: A traffic flow reading from a WSDOT sensor station. Updated approximately every 90 seconds, each reading reports the current Level of Service.

us.wa.wsdot.traveltimes.TravelTimeRoute.name: TravelTimeRoute
us.wa.wsdot.traveltimes.TravelTimeRoute.description: A named travel time route monitored by WSDOT. Each route has fixed start and end points on Washington State highways with historical average and current real-time travel times.

us.wa.wsdot.mountainpass.MountainPassCon.name: MountainPassCondition
us.wa.wsdot.mountainpass.MountainPassCon.description: Current conditions at a Washington State mountain pass including temperature, weather, road conditions, travel advisories, and directional restrictions.

us.wa.wsdot.weather.WeatherStation.name: WeatherStation
us.wa.wsdot.weather.WeatherStation.description: Metadata for a WSDOT road weather information system (RWIS) station. WSDOT operates approximately 134 stations across Washington State highways.

us.wa.wsdot.weather.WeatherReading.name: WeatherReading
us.wa.wsdot.weather.WeatherReading.description: A current weather reading from a WSDOT road weather station including temperature, wind, precipitation, pressure, humidity, visibility, and sky coverage.

us.wa.wsdot.tolls.TollRate.name: TollRate
us.wa.wsdot.tolls.TollRate.description: Current toll rate for a WSDOT tolled route segment. WSDOT operates dynamic tolling on SR 99, I-405, and SR 167.

us.wa.wsdot.cvrestrictions.CommercialVeh.name: CommercialVehicleRestriction
us.wa.wsdot.cvrestrictions.CommercialVeh.description: A commercial vehicle restriction on a Washington State highway bridge or road segment. Restrictions limit vehicle weight, height, length, or width.

us.wa.wsdot.border.BorderCrossing.name: BorderCrossing
us.wa.wsdot.border.BorderCrossing.description: Current wait time at a US-Canada border crossing lane in Washington State. Wait times are in minutes, updated approximately every 5 minutes.

us.wa.wsdot.ferries.VesselLocation.name: VesselLocation
us.wa.wsdot.ferries.VesselLocation.description: Real-time location and status of a Washington State Ferries vessel. WSF operates approximately 21 vessels across Puget Sound routes.

TrafficFlowStation.name: TrafficFlowStation
TrafficFlowStation.description: Metadata for a traffic flow sensor station in the WSDOT network. Each sensor is identified by a unique FlowDataID integer.

flow_data_id.description: Unique numeric identifier for this traffic flow sensor station, stringified from upstream FlowDataID.

station_name.description: Descriptive name of the flow sensor station.

description.description: Location description. Null if not provided.

road_name.description: Road designation where the sensor is installed.

direction.description: Direction of travel monitored. Examples: NB, SB, EB, WB.

TrafficFlowReading.name: TrafficFlowReading
TrafficFlowReading.description: A traffic flow reading from a WSDOT sensor station.

flow_data_id.description: Sensor station identifier, stringified from upstream FlowDataID.

flow_reading.description: Current traffic Level of Service. Converted from upstream FlowReadingValue byte.

reading_time.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the reading.

TravelTimeRoute.name: TravelTimeRoute
TravelTimeRoute.description: A named travel time route monitored by WSDOT with historical average and current real-time travel times in minutes.

travel_time_id.description: Unique route identifier, stringified from upstream TravelTimeID.

average_time.description: Historical average travel time in minutes.

current_time.description: Current real-time travel time in minutes.

time_updated.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last update.

MountainPassCondition.name: MountainPassCondition
MountainPassCondition.description: Current conditions at a Washington State mountain pass. WSDOT monitors 16 mountain passes reporting temperature, weather, road conditions, travel advisories, and directional restrictions.

mountain_pass_id.description: Unique pass identifier, stringified from upstream MountainPassId.

elevation_in_feet.description: Summit elevation in feet above sea level.

temperature_in_fahrenheit.description: Temperature at the summit in Fahrenheit. Null if not reporting.

weather_condition.description: Current weather condition text. Examples: Clear, Rain, Snow, Fog.

road_condition.description: Road surface condition text. Examples: Dry, Wet, Compact Snow, Ice.

travel_advisory_active.description: True if a travel advisory is in effect.

date_updated.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last update.

WeatherStation.name: WeatherStation
WeatherStation.description: Metadata for a WSDOT RWIS station.

station_name.description: Station name with highway and milepost.

WeatherReading.name: WeatherReading
WeatherReading.description: A current weather reading from a WSDOT RWIS station.

wind_direction.description: Wind direction in degrees from true north.

TollRate.name: TollRate
TollRate.description: Current toll rate for a WSDOT tolled route segment with dynamic pricing.

travel_direction.description: Travel direction: N, S, E, W.

CommercialVehicleRestriction.name: CommercialVehicleRestriction
CommercialVehicleRestriction.description: A commercial vehicle restriction on a Washington State highway bridge or road segment.

state_route_id.description: State route identifier, first part of composite key.

bridge_number.description: Bridge or structure number, second part of composite key.

BorderCrossing.name: BorderCrossing
BorderCrossing.description: US-Canada border crossing wait time in Washington State.

VesselLocation.name: VesselLocation
VesselLocation.description: Real-time location and status of a Washington State Ferries vessel.

vessel_id.description: Vessel identifier, stringified from upstream VesselID.

mmsi.description: Maritime Mobile Service Identity for AIS.
